unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Computer
title: Calendar and Reminders
drDigitalIntro: A digital calendar keeps your schedule organized. You can add events with a time and date — they sync to all your devices so you never miss an appointment. Reminders are like sticky notes for things to do without a specific time. Color-coding by calendar (Work = green, Personal = blue) makes it easy to see what type of event is coming up. Let's practice adding an event and a reminder!

playgroundTask.goal: You added a calendar event and a reminder

steps.say: Click on day 18 in the calendar to select it.
Click '+' to create a new event on the 18th.
Type 'Dentist Appointment' as the event title.
Click + to add a new reminder.

drDigitalSuccess: Your event and reminder are saved! Your calendar now keeps track of your appointment automatically.
drDigitalHint: Click a day to select it, click + to create an event, fill in the details, then save.
